feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Program to modify for avoid planned GI date update in Transportation Planning with TM
entry.content:
Hello

 

Please which program do i update to change the behavior of planned GI date update in SAP S/4HANA. Because I use this date for pricing at the order level and do not want it to be updated. How can I change this?

entry.title: Controlling Issue Stor Location of Constituents in MRP Area
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

Good afternoon.

We have two MRP areas set up for our plant and several storage areas under each. We are also using PP/DS.

The problem we are having is that we cannot control the Issue Stor Location for Component A when we run the MRP for FERT_A. We want to set the Issue Stor Location of component (HALB_B ,ROH_C etc.) to storage location A or storage location B or whatever we want.

Currently, even if the Issue storage location in the material master for HALB_B is specified as storage location B in MRP area ①, the Issue storage location for HALB_B is not set to B but to storage location A which is the Leading storage location in the MRP area ① setting in the PP/DS location master.

 

Please help.

entry.title: SDMI CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2
entry.content:
Hello!

I need your help to correct SDMI CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2.
I'm trying to upgrade SAP (S/4HANA 2021), and the target version is S/4HANA 2023 FPS 02 (10/2024).

But because of "DO_SDMI_CHECK->CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2" in "SI22: GENERIC_CHECKS", the SUM task cannot be proceeded.

Query : 
1) SELECT * FROM V_BUT100_EMP WHERE ( PROTECT = '' ) AND ( PROTECT < 'Z')
2) SELECT * FROM V_BUT100_EMP WHERE ( PROTECT < 'Z' ) AND ( ( PROTECT = '') AND ( BKVID LIKE 'HC%' ) )

Is there anyone who can deal with this issue?
I opened SAP Case on March 6th with it, but I have not received any response. (Component LO-MD-BP)
Skip is impossible, so our project schedule is also threatened.

Please I need your help.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to create PurRqs in ROH with heuristic SAP_MRP_001
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert

Is it possible to create PurRqs in ROH using SAP_MRP_001 in PP/DS?

SAP_MRP_002 states that you can do that, but I don't know where to find it.

What is the correct way to do this when I want to run MRP in PP/DS instead of MRPLive?

Heuristics for Production Planning - SAP Documentation

 

Nagase

entry.title: SES Creator Assignment and Notification Based on PO Creation Scenario
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have received a requirement from the customer to control the SES (Service Entry Sheet) creator and send notifications based on how the PO (Purchase Order) is created. The key point is that this should be achieved entirely through MM configuration, with minimum ABAP developments. However, if there is no standard way to achieve this, I would appreciate suggestions on possible workarounds.

Here are the requirements:

  1. PO Created with Reference to PR (Purchase Requisition)

    • The PR creator should be nominated as the SES creator.
    • The PR creator should receive a notification when the PO is created.
    • Another notification should be sent when the delivery date is reached.
    • Only the PR creator should be allowed to create the SES.

  2. PO Created Without PR

    • A field should be available to nominate the SES creator.
    • The recipient field, for example, should have a search help (F4) with a list of users.
    • The entered name in the recipient field should be assigned as the SES creator.
    • The SES creator should receive notifications when the PO is created and when the delivery date is reached.

  3. PO Created Without PR and Without Recipient Name

    • The system should allow any user with the appropriate role to create the SES.

  4. PO Created with PR and Recipient Name

    • Both the PR creator and the recipient should be allowed to create the SES.

Looking forward to your insights. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error message no. COD_BYD_ERP_INT025: Error in creation of accounting document for object 0000000300
entry.content:
Hi, we're currently in the process of implementing SAP Field Service Management. Our implementation partner has set everything up, but we are facing issues when we attempt to push expenses from C4C to S/4. We are not able to generate the internal order, and we receive the following error: Error message no. COD_BYD_ERP_INT025: Error in creation of accounting document for object 0000000300

We have followed all the steps in this documentation: Quick Start Guide Integration of SAP Hybris Cloud for Customer with SAP On-Premise Solutions

Does anyone know this error? Have we missed some configuration steps?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Deletable default user
entry.content:
Hi Community,.

We are using Private Cloud Edition of S/4HANA.
We are implementing S/4HANA 2023.
There are several S/4 users that customers (including our implementation partners) have not registered.
Is it safe to delete these? Or is it ok to lock the users?

_SAP_FIORI... This is the user that SAP uses when initially building the environment, and I believe it can be deleted.
_SAP_TEC_USR... This is the user who accesses the HANA DB behind the scenes and I am aware of it. Is it safe to lock it?
BGRFC_SUPER... This is the recognition used for the RFC connection. Is it safe to lock it?

entry.title: I want to plan the production date of the finished product based on the delivery date of the parts.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

Hello.

When the delivery date of a component is pushed back, we want to revise the production plan for semi-finished products produced using the component and finished products produced using the semi-finished products in a batch.

I know that this is possible by using Heuristic Rescheduling: Bottom-Up for Conti- I/O, but the plan is not revised until the last finished product.

Is heuristic customization not a good idea?
Should we use a different heuristic?
I would like your advice.

I report in the attachment the situation that is not working.

Best regards

Nagase

entry.title: Restricting transaction codes IW31, IW32, and IW33 at the order type level
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to restrict transaction codes IW31, IW32, and IW33 at the order type level. However, these transactions invoke the same authorization object, I_AUART, which contains only two authorization fields: WERKS and AUFART.

Could you confirm if there is an existing standard solution available for this requirement?

Looking forward to your response.

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: We need activate Scope Items in S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Dear SAP Consultant,
We have installed S/4 HANA 2023 and we need to activate Scope Items. Could you send me the steps to activate?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Advanced Return Management / Scrapping with movement type 551
entry.content:
Hello all,
we are facing following issue:
One of the logistical follow up activities we want to use is "transfer to scrap". However, the point is we cannot use it, due to some specific characteristics of the movement type 551. It requires a reason code. I would like to change it to the "not mandatory", but we need it for other process.
Question:
There are two possibilities to solve it.
1. We use a copy of the movement type 551 where the reason code isn't mandatory.
Question: Can I change the movement type used for that follow-up activity to another one?
2. There is a field on the material inspection document where I can enter the reason code.
Is it possible to add the field?
Thanks in advance
Vitali

entry.title: Download sales order attachments as a physical file (pdf,...)
entry.content:
Hello all
I have a requirement to download sales order attachments as a physical file (pdf,...). Is there a BAPI or API that can be used to do this. We will be doing it in CPI. Does anyone have any experience with this?

entry.title: Automatic Assignment of Sold-To Partner in STO Delivery (NL)
entry.content:
Hi all, I have an issue with the automatic determination for the partner function Sold-To Party (SP) in STO Deliveries (NL type). My requirement is for the system to automatically populate the Sold-To Party in the delivery document so that the value is stored in LIKP, eliminating the need for manual entry.

Currently, the system does not allow assigning origin "C" (table KNVP) in the Partner Determination Procedure in SPRO. However, when we manually enter the Sold-To Party, it works correctly, indicating that the issue is due to configuration limitations rather than process functionality.

I'm looking for guidance on how to configure the automatic assignment of the Sold-To Party in STO Deliveries (NL).

Any recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

In this case I have a customer assigned in T001W but when I create my STOs can be different customers (storage locations) and manually works but I want to configurate automatically

entry.title: Brazil Localization requirement for CIF price in Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
We have a requirement for our Brazil implementation to show the statistical item entered manually in the sales order pricing condition  in the Nota Fisacal.

Ex: the CIF price is  BRL$ 100  (This includes Freight BRL$40 and Insurance BRL$10) 

In the Sales order,  price condition  shows   as BRL$100
                                We manually input freight BRL$  40         -     S  (Statistical)
                                                        Insurance BRL$   10         -     S   (Statistical)

Now the question is how do we show the CIF price (BRL$100) the  FOB price (BRL$ 50)  which is  excluding Freight and Insurance (BRL$ 40 + BRL$ 10) in the Nota Fiscal (NF)?
Appreciate help

entry.title: Cds Documentation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am unable to find the documentation for the following CDS views in the S/4HANA 1809 section:

I_PurchaseOrder
I_PurchaseOrderItem
I_Supplier
I_Customer
I_Product
I_Stock
I_Material
I_Movement
I_ProfitCenter
I_GLAccountLineItem
I_SalesAnalysis
I_Project
I_ProjectNetwork
I_SalesCondition

If I check the CDS views at this link, not all the standard CDS views are documented like the ones mentioned above
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ee6ff9b281d8448f96b4fe6c89f2bdc8/8573b810511948c8a99c0672abc159aa.html?locale=en-US&version=1809.latest

Does anyone know how to perform a more in-depth search or where I can find official documentation for these views?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to post cost center in Surcharge Condition in SO(OR type) Billind Document In S4HC
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have situation that user want to post center center with surcharge condition. However, in S4H public cloud, OR type is not allowed to assign cost center in both sales order header or item level.

Only the sales order without charge function allows user to input cost center but the surcharge is used for normal order (i.e. OR type)

In S4H public cloud, cost center assignment from reason code is not available too. 

Any suggestion any expert could advice me. Thanks!

entry.title: Redefine S/4 Purchase Order OData Service with Custom Purchase Order Form
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to create a custom Purchase Order bases on the SAP Standard. The custom purchase order needs to get data from a Z-table and therefore SAP Standard OData(FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV) service would need to be redefined as well. I have done the following:

1) Created a new OData Service(ZFDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV) and Redefined the SAP Standard OData Service for Purchase order into it (FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV).

2) I have created an defined and activated a service in the gateway for the new service.

3) I have created my custom form template and uploaded it to Output Management Form Template. However at this step, my custom OData service is not available to select in the drop down?

4) As per note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003009083  I have created a copy of the call back class ZCL_MM_PUR_PO_OUTPUT_CALLBACK and replaced the hardcoded FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV with ZFDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV.

5) I have configured all the OPD steps. 

So my new form is being called correctly and I am happy about that. Hoever.. my new Z Odata service with its DPC classes is not being called. It is still calling the FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV service with its classes to populate the form. What am I missing? How do I link the redefined OData Service to my custom template?

Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: How to post GR for a consumable material without PO and directly consume it in MIGO?
entry.content:
I need to post a GR for a consumable material in MIGO without a PO. The material should not be stored in inventory but should be directly consumed (expensed to a cost center or another account assignment object).

I understand that movement type 201 is for issuing from stock, but in this case, the material is not in stock. 501 allows GR without PO, but it does not directly consume the material.

Is there a standard movement type for this process in SAP?

If not, can you guide me on how to create a custom movement type to handle this scenario?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to do Mass UD?
entry.content:
Hello,

can you please help me for any option to perform mass UD, except QA16.

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I get the field VEANZ in the VEPO tablet to support decimals
entry.content: For the packaging materials for finish goods pallets which can be seen in HUMO in the tab content I need to be able to work with decimals, but the field used VEANZ from VEPO can only hold integers. How can I work with decimals in the VEANZ field in the VEPO table?
